---
title: 'The Playground, LLC'
date: '2050-09-19T07:55:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'The Playground, LLC'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '4895948435903615183'
blogger_filename: '/2017/09/the-playground-llc.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/The Playground, LLC/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'PreLaunchResearch'
---

<b>Welcome to The Playground, LLC!&nbsp;</b><br />
<br />
<table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; text-align: center;"><tbody>
<tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/playground-long-fa6d22e47d97.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img border="0" data-original-height="217" data-original-width="982" height="140" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/playground-long-eeb4273e67db.jpg" width="640" /></a></td></tr>
<tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;"><i>*Image is an example PlaySmart equipment we intend to use, not of the actual facility... Yet!</i></td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<h4>
The Vision:</h4>
We want to give North Idaho a place to play &amp; grow!<br />
<div>
<br />
Help us give North Idaho a place to play &amp; grow, here's what that looks like<b>:</b></div>
<br />
<div>
The Playground is a Movement-Based Entertainment Center for the Coeur d'Alene, Idaho Community. The facility features an indoor over-sized&nbsp;<a href="https://theplaygroundllc.blogspot.com/2018/02/playsmart-worlds-best-playgrounds.html">PlaySmart Playground</a>, tables and seating for parents (who tire quickly) and meeting rooms. There are also mini-events and movement-based arcade games (but only those that keep the body moving).&nbsp;</div>
<div>
<i><br /></i></div>
<div>
<i>*See "<a href="https://theplaygroundllc.blogspot.com/p/what-is-playground.html" target="_blank">What is The Playground?</a>" for more details.</i><br />
<br /></div>
<div style="text-align: center;">
***</div>
<br />
<br />
We are working on opening The Playground, LLC in phases.<br />
<br />
<b>As of February 2018, we are HERE &gt; Phase One:</b><br />
<br />
We are currently working on business planning and cost projections. This includes filing the LLC and starting to work with vendors and local entities.<br />
<br />
Phase one began 02/21/2018 and is in progress at this time.<br />
<br />
<br />
<b>Phase Two:</b><br />
<br />
We will start to use various resources, such as Crowd Funding, Grants, and Loans to raise capital.<br />
<ul>
<li><a href="https://www.gofundme.com/theplaygroundllc" target="_blank">GoFundMe</a></li>
<ul>
<li>https://www.gofundme.com/theplaygroundllc</li>
</ul>
</ul>
<br />
<b>Phase Three:&nbsp;</b><br />
<br />
We will buy/lease the building/land and start construction.<br />
<br />
<b><br /></b> <b>Phase Four:</b><br />
<br />
A soft opening followed by a Grand Opening. Then keep it going!<br />
<br />
